message:
demo: use built browser package, update tests

- Demo now uses dist/lanceql.js (npm-publishable build)
- Copy lanceql.js and lanceql-worker.js from dist/ to examples/wasm/
- Default query: JOIN + NEAR + push-down filtering
- E2E tests verify results are actually displayed

files.patch:
